senior.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
senior.note: 3 EM cycles in design phase — implementation must begin NOW. Minimum deliverable this cycle: action class decision (browser.* extension of shell.exec vs new class) + stub invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts (BrowserScopeViolation, BrowserStateViolation, BrowserPacingViolation). Additionally: pick up #1477 (P1 telemetry URL fix, ~1 line in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts) as maintenance item.

secondary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
secondary.note: 3 EM cycles in design phase — prototype must begin NOW. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts from Go kernel. Start with packages/kernel/src/decision.ts hook for irreversible action detection (infra.destroy, git.force-push, deploy.trigger to prod, file.delete with no backup). Additionally: document #1478 (P2 Go fast-path telemetry gap) as accepted gap per Option 2.
